subcodes.first_line: Verily, the verses have been sent down in such wise that none can reckon them save God, the All-Knowing, the All-Informed. The Most Exalted Pen moveth through [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد نزلت الایات علی شان لایحصیها احد الا الله العلیم الخبیر قد یجول القلم الاعلی فی
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
